body:
## Summary
The 6 buff types defined in `buff.ts` (HAND_CHIPS_BONUS, HAND_MULT_BONUS, ELEMENT_CHIPS_BONUS, ALL_CHIPS_BONUS, HP_BONUS, SKILL_ENERGY_MAX) were never generated by `generateUpgradePool`. This PR wires all of them into the upgrade pool.

## Changes

### `buff.ts`
- Expand `generateUpgradePool` from 3 to 22 upgrades:
  - Element chips +5, element chip mult ×1.1, element draw, high-rank draw
  - 8 hand-type chips bonuses (common +10, rare +20, epic +35)
  - 5 hand-type mult bonuses (rare +2, epic +3)
  - All-chips bonus +2 per card
  - HP bonus +5
  - Skill energy max +1 (unique, filterable via `excludeTypes`)
- Add `applyPlayerBuffs()` — reads HP_BONUS and SKILL_ENERGY_MAX from buffs array, returns computed maxHp and skillEnergyMax
- Add `excludeTypes` parameter for unique-buff tracking

### `runtime.ts`
- `createRoom` now accepts optional `buffs` and applies them through `applyPlayerBuffs`

### Tests
- Replaced non-deterministic "returns element upgrade" test with deterministic excludeTypes tests

## Verification
- `tsc --noEmit` — zero errors
- 196/198 unit tests pass (2 pre-existing intermittent failures unrelated to this change)
title: feat(buff): wire 6 buff types into upgrade pool and player stats
